description_long: This is a modern, boxy bungalow with a flat roof and large, rectangular windows arranged in a grid pattern on the front and sides. The exterior is primarily white, with some gray and green accents from landscaping and a driveway extending from one side. The property features a small yard with several trees and a children's swing set, suggesting a family-oriented design. The building appears to have two stories, with a rooftop terrace or garden area visible. The windows are expansive, allowing for ample natural light, and the overall structure is compact yet spacious. The clean lines and minimalistic design reflect a contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, white, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large grid windows, and surrounding landscaping including trees and a swing set.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large grid windows, driveway, trees, and a swing set.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, side windows, driveway extension, and additional trees.
description_view_2: Rear view with more windows, rooftop greenery, and a clear view of the driveway's length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the swing set, more trees, and the full length of the driveway.
